title: Man Face World
description: Give the inhabitants of your world a Man Face!
body:
This resourcepack changes the textures of some items and mobs and adds the Man Face from Roblox to them, you will encounter these changes regularly and it will make the gameplay more fresh. The amount of changes will grow with each update so stay tuned!


![panda](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b25632176f5aa8abd16f0f8020e1e0f98f17de0.png)
